name: Taiyo Koki Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiyo Koki Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells grinding machine tools in Japan and internationally. The company offers CNC vertical, internal, cylindrical, and thread grinding machines. It serves automobile, construction machinery, bearings, machine tools, printing machinery, and metal product manufacturing sectors. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Nagaoka, Japan.
